model.label: Gemini 3 Flash
model.description: Google • Fast Gemini model optimized for low-latency reasoning, multimodal inputs, and tool use.

pick.rationale: Michigan enters the tournament as a dominant 1-seed, boasting a top-10 offense and the nation's 2nd-ranked adjusted defensive efficiency. While the Wolverines are dealing with the loss of key backup guard LJ Cason and forward Cole Sullivan to season-ending injuries, their starting lineup remains one of the most balanced and efficient in the country. UMBC, despite their historical reputation for 16-seed upsets, lacks the analytical profile or interior size to consistently challenge a Michigan squad that has proven its resilience by clinching the Big Ten title even while shorthanded. Expect Michigan's elite defense to stifle UMBC's perimeter-oriented attack and secure a comfortable victory.

reasoningStep.title: Michigan's Elite Profile vs. UMBC's Upset History
reasoningStep.summary: Michigan is a top-2 team nationally with elite efficiency on both ends, while UMBC is a mid-tier mid-major that lacks the statistical profile to repeat its 2018 miracle.
evidence: Michigan ranks #2 in both KenPom and Bart Torvik with a 31-2 record and the #2 adjusted defensive efficiency in the country.
UMBC ranks #185 in both metrics, indicating a massive talent and efficiency gap.
Despite season-ending injuries to key rotation players LJ Cason and Cole Sullivan, Michigan's core remains intact and has continued to win high-level Big Ten games down the stretch.

toolCalls.summary: Returned combined Torvik/KenPom ratings for 2 teams.
Returned 5 search results for "Michigan basketball injuries news 2026 tournament".

result.snippet: L.J . Cason will not take the court again until the 2027-28 season. modelTrace.content:
You are an analyst predicting a single March Madness game inside a bracket run.
You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.
Use prior picks as already committed bracket state.
You may use at most 10 tool rounds before you must finalize your answer.
Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
Return strict JSON only.
Final JSON keys: pick, reasoningStep.
pick must contain gameId, winnerId, confidence, rationale.
The rationale must be a short paragraph of 2 to 4 sentences explaining why the winner was chosen.
reasoningStep must contain id, title, summary, evidence.
Bracket config id: 2026-bracket
Tournament year: 2026
Current game id: r64-midwest-1
Current game label: Midwest 1/16
Round: Round of 64
Resolved teams: Michigan (michigan) vs UMBC (umbc)
Prior committed picks: 28
